title: 「Just as + 形容詞／副詞」同等程度句型
titleZh: 「Just as + 形容詞／副詞」表達「同樣程度」
titleEn: Using just as + adjective / adverb + as to express equal degree

source.file: Sentence Structure 98 -「Just as + 形容詞／副詞」表達「同樣程度」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: A + be + just as + adjective + as + B

formulas.formula: A + be + just as + adjective + as + B
A + action verb + just as + adverb + as + B

formulas.labelZh: 根據上文省略比較對象
formulas.formula: A + be / action verb + just as + adjective / adverb

example: Watching videos on YouTube is just as effective as reading.
exampleZh: 觀看 YouTube 影片和閱讀一樣有效。

examples.en: Watching videos on YouTube is just as effective as reading.
examples.zh: 觀看 YouTube 影片和閱讀一樣有效。

examples.en: Maya explained the idea just as clearly as her teacher did.
examples.zh: 瑪雅解釋這個概念時和她的老師一樣清楚。
examples.highlight: just as clearly as her teacher did

examples.en: People enjoy learning by reading, but I believe that watching videos on YouTube is just as effective.
examples.zh: 人們喜歡透過閱讀學習，但我相信觀看 YouTube 影片也同樣有效。

meaning.zh: 這個句型表示兩個人物、事物或活動在某方面具有相同程度或以相同程度完成動作。

rules.zh: 這裏的 just 用來強調兩者的程度相同，不是「只是」的意思。
rules.en: Here, just emphasises that the two things have exactly the same degree; it does not mean only.
examples: The smaller room is just as comfortable as the larger room.

rules.zh: 形容詞前通常需要 be：Subject + be + just as + adjective + as + comparison。
rules.en: An adjective comparison normally needs be before just as.
examples: The second task is just as difficult as the first task.

rules.zh: 一般動詞後使用副詞；修飾 works 等動詞時要使用 carefully，而不是 careful。
rules.en: Use an adverb after an action verb; for example, carefully rather than careful modifies works.
examples: Ben works just as carefully as his colleague.

rules.zh: Just as 必須與第二個 as 配合，不可使用 than。
rules.en: Just as must pair with a second as, not than.
examples: The bus is just as convenient as the train.

rules.zh: 比較的兩部分要屬於同一類，例如人與人、物件與物件、活動與活動。
rules.en: The two sides of the comparison should belong to the same category, such as person with person or activity with activity.
examples: Reading the instructions is just as important as checking the answers.

rules.zh: 本練習只集中教授 just as + adjective / adverb + as，不包括 just as 表示「就在……時」或「正如」的用法。
rules.en: This lesson covers only just as + adjective / adverb + as, not just as meaning at the exact time or in the way stated.

benefits.zh: 這個句型可以直接告訴讀者，第一項事物並不比第二項較差、較弱或較不重要。
benefits.en: It clearly shows that two things have the same degree and that the first is not weaker or less important.

benefits.zh: 它可以糾正因一件事較便宜、較小或較簡單便認為它一定較差的常見假設。
benefits.en: It helps correct common assumptions that something cheaper, smaller or simpler must be worse.

benefits.zh: 它把完整比較放在一句之內，不需要分開寫兩個重複的短句。
benefits.en: It combines a complete comparison in one sentence instead of using two repetitive short sentences.

benefits.zh: 加入 just 可以強調「確實同樣」，令比較更有力和明確。
benefits.en: Adding just makes the equal comparison stronger and more explicit.

benefits.zh: 這個框架適合用於日常對話、作文、報告、辯論及英語口試。
benefits.en: It provides a practical speaking and writing frame for conversations, essays, reports, debates and oral examinations.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using just as … as to show that two people, things or actions have the same degree of a quality.
You may need to change a noun into an adjective or an adjective into an adverb.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 just as … as 改寫以下句子，以表達兩個人物、事物或活動在某方面程度相同。
部分題目可能需要把名詞改為形容詞，或把形容詞改為副詞。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The blue bag and the red bag are equally light.
questions.promptZh: 藍色袋和紅色袋同樣輕。
questions.answer: The blue bag is just as light as the red bag.
questions.answerZh: 藍色袋和紅色袋一樣輕。
questions.highlight: The blue bag is just as light as the red bag.

questions.prompt: Walking and cycling provide the same health benefits.
questions.promptZh: 步行和踏單車帶來相同的健康益處。
questions.answer: Walking is just as healthy as cycling.
questions.answerZh: 步行和踏單車同樣有益健康。
questions.highlight: Walking is just as healthy as cycling.

questions.prompt: There is no difference in how interesting this book and that one are.
questions.promptZh: 這本書和那本書同樣有趣，沒有分別。

questions.answerZh: 這本書和那本書一樣有趣。
